command:
BASE="http://192.168.0.191:5678/webhook/chatgpt-homelab-agent"
AUDIT="/opt/docker/mcp-data/filesystem/audit/compliance"

echo "=== PRE-TEST: clear any existing audit files ==="
rm -f $AUDIT/*.json
ls $AUDIT/ | wc -l

echo ""
echo "=== TEST 1: router info ==="
curl -s -X POST "$BASE" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"message":"router info"}' -o /tmp/t1.json
python3 -c "
import json; d=json.load(open('/tmp/t1.json'))
if isinstance(d,list): d=d[0]
print(f'  sentinel_result={d.get(\"sentinel_result\")} blocked={d.get(\"blocked\")} audit_written={d.get(\"audit_written\")} audit_error={d.get(\"audit_error\")}')
"

echo ""
echo "=== TEST 2: needs approval ==="
curl -s -X POST "$BASE" -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"message":"governance change request","changeId":"9A2-002","baseline":"Phase9A1-AuditTrailSpec","rollbackPlan":"restore baselines/production/router/","evidence":"Phase 9A.2 audit test"}' \
  -o /tmp/t2.json
python3 -c "
import json; d=json.load(open('/tmp/t2.json'))
if isinstance(d,list): d=d[0]
print(f'  sentinel_result={d.get(\"sentinel_result\")} blocked={d.get(\"blocked\")} audit_written={d.get(\"audit_written\")}')
"

echo ""
echo "=== TEST 3: needs rollback ==="
curl -s -X POST "$BASE" -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"message":"governance change request","changeId":"9A2-003","baseline":"Phase9A1-AuditTrailSpec","evidence":"test","approvalStatus":"APPROVED"}' \
  -o /tmp/t3.json
python3 -c "
import json; d=json.load(open('/tmp/t3.json'))
if isinstance(d,list): d=d[0]
print(f'  sentinel_result={d.get(\"sentinel_result\")} blocked={d.get(\"blocked\")} audit_written={d.get(\"audit_written\")}')
"

echo ""
echo "=== TEST 4: needs baseline ==="
curl -s -X POST "$BASE" -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"message":"governance change request","changeId":"9A2-004","rollbackPlan":"restore","evidence":"test","approvalStatus":"APPROVED"}' \
  -o /tmp/t4.json
python3 -c "
import json; d=json.load(open('/tmp/t4.json'))
if isinstance(d,list): d=d[0]
print(f'  sentinel_result={d.get(\"sentinel_result\")} blocked={d.get(\"blocked\")} audit_written={d.get(\"audit_written\")}')
"

echo ""
echo "=== TEST 5: all present ==="
curl -s -X POST "$BASE" -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"message":"governance change request","changeId":"9A2-005","baseline":"Phase9A1-AuditTrailSpec","rollbackPlan":"restore baselines/production/router/","evidence":"all present test","approvalStatus":"APPROVED","approvalReference":"Jose-approved-9A2-005"}' \
  -o /tmp/t5.json
python3 -c "
import json; d=json.load(open('/tmp/t5.json'))
if isinstance(d,list): d=d[0]
print(f'  sentinel_result={d.get(\"sentinel_result\")} blocked={d.get(\"blocked\")} audit_written={d.get(\"audit_written\")}')
"

echo ""
echo "=== AUDIT FILES WRITTEN ==="
ls -lah $AUDIT/
echo ""
echo "=== SAMPLE AUDIT FILE CONTENT ==="
ls $AUDIT/*.json 2>/dev/null | head -1 | xargs python3 -c "
import json, sys
d=json.load(open(sys.argv[1]))
print(json.dumps(d, indent=2))" 2>/dev/null || echo "No audit files found"

echo ""
echo "=== SUMMARY ==="
python3 -c "
import os, glob, json
audit_dir = '/opt/docker/mcp-data/filesystem/audit/compliance'
files = glob.glob(audit_dir + '/*.json')
print(f'Audit files created: {len(files)}')
for f in sorted(files):
    d = json.load(open(f))
    print(f'  {os.path.basename(f)}: result={d.get(\"sentinel_result\")} blocked={d.get(\"blocked\")} requestType={d.get(\"request_type\")}')
print()
print(f'Phase 9A.2 Complete: {len(files) >= 5}')
"
